# kemp_waf_custom_rule (Data Source)

Looks up a custom legacy WAF rule file stored on the LoadMaster by filename.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_waf_custom_rule" "existing" {
  filename = "modsecurity_crs_11_brute_force"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filename` (String) Filename of the WAF custom rule file.
